title: Implement Modular Monoliths
description: Implement logical 'seams' within a monolithic application to define clear module boundaries. Utilize build-time tooling to enforce strict architectural boundaries in a modular monolith. Evaluate how modular monoliths maintain refactorability while avoiding the operational cost of distributed systems.
objectives: Implement logical 'seams' within a monolithic application to define clear module boundaries.
Utilize build-time tooling to enforce strict architectural boundaries in a modular monolith.
Evaluate how modular monoliths maintain refactorability while avoiding the operational cost of distributed systems.
